{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323044750BDA2BE352E8A7C4496B9"}"},"total":3195},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7134613857624589086","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"真的巨巨巨好看！！好久没看过这么好看的寻宝文了，剧情很紧凑，不水，作者的逻辑很清晰，整个故事看的也很爽，就是男主的发小个人感觉有点毒，其他的都非常完美，作者大大一定要继续写下去！！加油加油加油！！[送心][送心]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1661156836,"group_id":"7104378213622615078","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5/GcGjbjyyBWvUddEQmRxWsa4h10bXuOutb5g7gMaw7","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/2e733d888ee1443981b59036e9e73bc7~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776793677&x-signature=aILidbg%2FpE0G%2FqdGpUvhTJUYBj4%3D","user_id":"3624443022677239","user_name":"甜粽子咸豆腐脑人"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3624443022677239","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7104378213622615078","book_info":{"abstract":"一场突如其来的意外，让萧然陷入了进退两难的境地，却也赋予了他一种匪夷所思的超能力。
凭借这种神奇的超能力，身在异国他乡的萧然，由此开启了一段异国寻宝捡漏的传奇历程。
